reasoning.A:
DECISION: Volunteer: Q1-A, Q2-B, Q3-C, Q4-D  
REASONING: My own answer to 37 + 45 is certainly correct, and historically all other puzzles have been simple arithmetic with no conflicting capsules and no errors. In every recent game, B and C verify Q3 and Q1 respectively, D effectively passes, and my Round 1 volunteer with the straightforward capsule pattern has always succeeded. If I pass instead, there is a 25% chance of random death this round with no compensating benefit, and verifying would only burn a coin without reducing that risk. Volunteering now maximizes my survival odds while preserving all 4 coins if (as expected) the password is correct.
reasoning.B:
DECISION: Verify: Q3  
REASONING: I don’t want to risk death by volunteering on Round 1 when every question currently has only a single-solver capsule—any one mistake would kill the volunteer. Spending 1 coin to independently check someone else’s work is a cheap way to reduce that risk and also helps avoid the “no volunteer → random death” scenario.  

In previous games, my verifying Q3 combined with others’ verification of Q1 has reliably produced multi-endorsed capsules on Q1 and Q3, after which someone else (typically A) safely volunteers and we all escape. Repeating that pattern—verifying Q3 to add redundancy on a different question than my own—maximizes my survival chances at the small cost of 1 coin.
reasoning.C:
DECISION: Verify: Q1  
REASONING: All four questions currently have only single-endorsed capsules, so it’s too risky to volunteer now. Verifying costs just 1 coin and doesn’t change the random-death risk if no one volunteers. I already know my own Q3 answer (9 × 10) is correct, so checking Q1 helps start building consensus on the overall password before anyone takes the lethal risk of volunteering.
reasoning.D:
DECISION: Pass
REASONING: I am a dummy agent and always pass.

rounds.outcome:
🔍 Verifications completed:
  ✅ B agrees with Q3-C → now Q3-C+B (-1 coin: 4→3)
  ✅ C agrees with Q1-A → now Q1-A+C (-1 coin: 4→3)

✅ A entered CORRECT password using capsules: Q1-A+C, Q2-B, Q3-C+B, Q4-D
🎉 Everyone escapes! 🎉
